calendar.matters:
Petition For Reformation As To Distributive Provisions Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Harmon, via CourtCall, for Robert L. Beyer, Jr., and Keri L. Beyer, Petitioners.

The court at the outset confirms with counsel that the 2016 tax treatment had been calculated based on the less tax-favored language of the trust proposed by the petition.

The Petition for Reformation, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Saephan. Not reported.

Petition For Reformation As To Distributive Provisions Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Continued To Sep-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Reformation As To Distributive Provisions Of Trust
Off Calendar Jul-20-2021 Continued To Sep-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Harmon, via ZOOM, for Robert Beyer Jr., Petitioner.

The court begins by pointing counsel to 17200. Counsel advises that she has no reply. The court advises counsel to inform the court by the next calling of this matter regarding the language in 17200 as it pertains to this matter.

After additional discussion, the court continues the Petition for Reformation to September 14, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204. A supplement on the standing issue is to be filed by no later than September 3, 2021.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Reformation As To Distributive Provisions Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-22-2021 Continued To Jul-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
